_comment: Ultra-Enhanced Pterodactyl/Pelican Egg for Icecast AutoDJ Radio Streaming - Created by @zeropointbruh
name: Icecast-AutoDJ-Extreme
author: wegj1@hotmail.com
description: Ultra-enhanced Icecast radio streaming server with AutoDJ, multi-playlist support, ads rotation, jingle injection, and advanced features. Created by @zeropointbruh (wegj1@hotmail.com) - https://banabyte.com. Compatible with both Pterodactyl and Pelican Panel.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash

###################################################################################
# Ultra-Enhanced Installation Script for Icecast AutoDJ Radio
# Created by: @zeropointbruh (wegj1@hotmail.com)
# Website: https://banabyte.com
# 
# Features:
# - Interactive setup with feature prompts
# - Multi-playlist support configuration
# - Ads and jingles folder creation
# - Comprehensive error handling and validation
# - Self-healing installation with fallbacks
# - Pelican Panel and Pterodactyl compatible
###################################################################################

set -e

RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
BLUE='\033[0;34m'
MAGENTA='\033[0;35m'
CYAN='\033[0;36m'
NC='\033[0m'

log_info() {
    echo -e "${GREEN}[INFO]${NC} $1"
}

log_warn() {
    echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARN]${NC} $1"
}

log_error() {
    echo -e "${RED}[ERROR]${NC} $1"
}

log_success() {
    echo -e "${CYAN}[SUCCESS]${NC} $1"
}

log_banner() {
    echo -e "${MAGENTA}$1${NC}"
}

check_command() {
    if ! command -v $1 &> /dev/null; then
        log_error "Required command '$1' not found"
        return 1
    fi
    return 0
}

log_banner "╔═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗"
log_banner "║  Ultra-Enhanced Icecast AutoDJ Installation v2.0             ║"
log_banner "║  Created by: @zeropointbruh                                   ║"
log_banner "║  Email: wegj1@hotmail.com                                    ║"
log_banner "║  Website: https://banabyte.com                               ║"
log_banner "╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝"

log_info "Starting installation process..."

cd /mnt/server || {
    log_error "Failed to access /mnt/server directory"
    exit 1
}

log_info "Validating required commands..."
check_command git || exit 1
check_command chmod || exit 1
check_command mkdir || exit 1

log_info "Cleaning up any existing installation..."
if [ -d "icecast-autodj" ]; then
    log_warn "Existing installation found, removing..."
    rm -rf icecast-autodj
fi

log_info "Cloning enhanced Icecast AutoDJ repository..."
REPO_URL="${REPO_URL:-https://github.com/zeropointbruh/icecast-autodj.git}"
log_info "Repository: $REPO_URL"

if ! git clone "$REPO_URL" icecast-autodj 2>/dev/null; then
    log_warn "Primary repository unavailable, trying fallback..."
    if ! git clone "https://github.com/jensjeflensje/icecast-autodj.git" icecast-autodj; then
        log_error "All repository sources failed"
        exit 1
    fi
    log_success "Cloned from fallback repository"
else
    log_success "Cloned from primary repository"
fi

cd icecast-autodj || exit 1

log_info "Setting up permissions..."
if [ -f "run.sh" ]; then
    chmod +x run.sh
else
    log_warn "run.sh not found in repository, will use custom script"
fi

log_info "Configuring Icecast..."
if [ -f /etc/icecast2/icecast.xml ]; then
    mv /etc/icecast2/icecast.xml /etc/icecast2/icecast.bcp.xml 2>/dev/null || true
fi

if [ -f configs/icecast.xml ]; then
    cp configs/icecast.xml /mnt/server/icecast.xml
else
    log_error "icecast.xml not found in configs directory"
    exit 1
fi

log_info "Configuring ezstream..."
mkdir -p /etc/ezstream || true

if [ -f configs/ezstream.v1.xml ]; then
    cp configs/ezstream.v1.xml /mnt/server/ezstream.xml
elif [ -f configs/ezstream.v0.xml ]; then
    cp configs/ezstream.v0.xml /mnt/server/ezstream.xml
else
    log_error "ezstream configuration not found"
    exit 1
fi

log_info "Creating playlist file..."
touch /mnt/server/playlist.m3u

if [ -d /etc/ezstream ]; then
    ln -sf /mnt/server/playlist.m3u /etc/ezstream/playlist.m3u 2>/dev/null || true
fi

log_info "Setting up directory structure..."
mkdir -p /mnt/server/music
mkdir -p /mnt/server/log

# Advanced feature setup based on environment variables
if [ "${ENABLE_ADS}" = "true" ] || [ "${ENABLE_ADS}" = "1" ]; then
    log_success "Ads feature ENABLED - Creating ads directory"
    mkdir -p /mnt/server/ads
    echo "# Place your advertisement audio files here" > /mnt/server/ads/README.txt
    echo "# Supported formats: MP3, OGG, OPUS, FLAC, M4A" >> /mnt/server/ads/README.txt
    echo "# Ads will play every ${ADS_FREQUENCY:-5} songs" >> /mnt/server/ads/README.txt
else
    log_info "Ads feature disabled (set ENABLE_ADS=true to enable)"
fi

if [ "${ENABLE_JINGLES}" = "true" ] || [ "${ENABLE_JINGLES}" = "1" ]; then
    log_success "Jingles feature ENABLED - Creating jingles directory"
    mkdir -p /mnt/server/jingles
    echo "# Place your station jingles/IDs here" > /mnt/server/jingles/README.txt
    echo "# Supported formats: MP3, OGG, OPUS, FLAC, M4A" >> /mnt/server/jingles/README.txt
    echo "# Jingles will play every ${JINGLE_FREQUENCY:-3} songs" >> /mnt/server/jingles/README.txt
else
    log_info "Jingles feature disabled (set ENABLE_JINGLES=true to enable)"
fi

if [ "${USE_MULTI_PLAYLIST}" = "true" ] || [ "${USE_MULTI_PLAYLIST}" = "1" ]; then
    log_success "Multi-Playlist mode ENABLED - Creating playlists directory"
    mkdir -p /mnt/server/playlists
    mkdir -p /mnt/server/playlists/playlist1
    mkdir -p /mnt/server/playlists/playlist2
    mkdir -p /mnt/server/playlists/playlist3
    echo "# Multi-Playlist Mode" > /mnt/server/playlists/README.txt
    echo "# Create subdirectories for different playlists" >> /mnt/server/playlists/README.txt
    echo "# Example: playlists/rock/, playlists/pop/, playlists/jazz/" >> /mnt/server/playlists/README.txt
    echo "# All will be mixed intelligently by the AutoDJ" >> /mnt/server/playlists/README.txt
else
    log_info "Single playlist mode (set USE_MULTI_PLAYLIST=true for multi-playlist)"
fi

if [ ! -d /var/log/icecast2 ]; then
    ln -sf /mnt/server/log /var/log/icecast2 2>/dev/null || true
fi

log_info "Setting ownership permissions..."
if id -u icecast2 &>/dev/null; then
    chown -R icecast2:icecast /etc/ezstream 2>/dev/null || true
    chown -R icecast2:icecast /mnt/server/music 2>/dev/null || true
    chown -R icecast2:icecast /mnt/server/log 2>/dev/null || true
    [ -d /mnt/server/ads ] && chown -R icecast2:icecast /mnt/server/ads 2>/dev/null || true
    [ -d /mnt/server/jingles ] && chown -R icecast2:icecast /mnt/server/jingles 2>/dev/null || true
    [ -d /mnt/server/playlists ] && chown -R icecast2:icecast /mnt/server/playlists 2>/dev/null || true
else
    log_warn "icecast2 user not found, skipping ownership changes"
fi

log_info "Creating helper scripts..."
cat > /mnt/server/refresh_playlist.sh << 'REFRESH_EOF'
#!/bin/bash
log_info() { echo -e "\033[0;32m[INFO]\033[0m $1"; }
log_info "Refreshing playlist..."
EZSTREAM_PID=$(pgrep ezstream | head -1)
if [ -n "$EZSTREAM_PID" ]; then
    kill -SIGHUP $EZSTREAM_PID
    log_info "Playlist refresh signal sent"
else
    echo "ezstream not running"
fi
REFRESH_EOF

cat > /mnt/server/skip_track.sh << 'SKIP_EOF'
#!/bin/bash
log_info() { echo -e "\033[0;32m[INFO]\033[0m $1"; }
log_info "Skipping current track..."
EZSTREAM_PID=$(pgrep ezstream | head -1)
if [ -n "$EZSTREAM_PID" ]; then
    kill -SIGUSR1 $EZSTREAM_PID
    log_info "Skip signal sent"
else
    echo "ezstream not running"
fi
SKIP_EOF

chmod +x /mnt/server/refresh_playlist.sh 2>/dev/null || true
chmod +x /mnt/server/skip_track.sh 2>/dev/null || true

log_info "Verifying installation..."
ERRORS=0

[ ! -f /mnt/server/icecast.xml ] && { log_error "icecast.xml not found"; ERRORS=$((ERRORS+1)); }
[ ! -f /mnt/server/ezstream.xml ] && { log_error "ezstream.xml not found"; ERRORS=$((ERRORS+1)); }
[ ! -f /mnt/server/playlist.m3u ] && { log_error "playlist.m3u not found"; ERRORS=$((ERRORS+1)); }
[ ! -d /mnt/server/music ] && { log_error "music directory not found"; ERRORS=$((ERRORS+1)); }
[ ! -d /mnt/server/log ] && { log_error "log directory not found"; ERRORS=$((ERRORS+1)); }

if [ $ERRORS -gt 0 ]; then
    log_error "Installation completed with $ERRORS error(s)"
    exit 1
fi

log_success "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
log_success "  Installation completed successfully!"
log_success "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
echo ""
log_info "Next steps:"
log_info "  1. Upload music files to /music directory"
[ -d /mnt/server/ads ] && log_info "  2. Upload ads to /ads directory (optional)"
[ -d /mnt/server/jingles ] && log_info "  3. Upload jingles to /jingles directory (optional)"
[ -d /mnt/server/playlists ] && log_info "  4. Organize playlists in /playlists/* directories"
log_info "  5. Start the server"
log_info "  6. Access: http://YOUR_IP:PORT/autodj"
echo ""
log_banner "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
log_banner "  Created by: @zeropointbruh (wegj1@hotmail.com)"
log_banner "  Website: https://banabyte.com"
log_banner "  LICENSE: Credit @zeropointbruh when using commercially"
log_banner "  This software follows Icecast GPL v2 licensing"
log_banner "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"

exit 0

variables.name: Repository URL
variables.description: Git repository URL for Icecast AutoDJ source code

variables.name: Enable Ads
variables.description: Enable ads rotation feature? Creates /ads folder for advertisement audio files.

variables.name: Enable Jingles
variables.description: Enable jingle injection feature? Creates /jingles folder for station IDs and jingles.

variables.name: Multi-Playlist Mode
variables.description: Enable multi-playlist support? Creates /playlists folder for organizing multiple playlists.

variables.name: Ads Frequency
variables.description: Play one ad every X songs (only if ads enabled)

variables.name: Jingle Frequency
variables.description: Play one jingle every X songs (only if jingles enabled)

variables.name: Source Password
variables.description: Password for streaming sources to connect to Icecast

variables.name: Admin Password
variables.description: Password for Icecast web admin interface

variables.name: Admin Username
variables.description: Username for Icecast web admin interface

variables.name: Relay Password
variables.description: Password for relay servers

variables.name: AutoDJ Password
variables.description: Password for AutoDJ mount point

variables.name: Live Password
variables.description: Password for live streaming mount point

variables.name: Mount Point
variables.description: Mount point for AutoDJ stream

variables.name: Max Clients
variables.description: Maximum concurrent listeners

variables.name: Max Sources
variables.description: Maximum streaming sources

variables.name: Stream Format
variables.description: Audio format for stream

variables.name: Station Name
variables.description: Your radio station name

variables.name: Station Genre
variables.description: Your radio station genre

variables.name: Station Description
variables.description: Your radio station description

variables.name: Hostname
variables.description: Hostname or IP for the radio server

variables.name: Location
variables.description: Geographic location of server

variables.name: Admin Email
variables.description: Contact email for server administrator
